parameters.content:
## QTP Order Lifecycle Ingestor (G22)
Polls Alpaca paper for ALL order lifecycle states (stop/bracket/cancel/replace, nested legs) every 10 min; ET 09-16 weekday gate enforced inside the Code node (timezone-safe regardless of instance TZ). Insert is idempotent via NOT EXISTS on order_event_id because quantum.order_events has NO PK or unique constraint (ON CONFLICT impossible).

Alpaca creds: n8n instance vars ALPACA_API_KEY + ALPACA_SECRET_KEY (same pattern as Trailing Stop Manager); fallback = this workflow staticData _alpaca_key/_alpaca_secret. Fails loud with OLI_NO_ALPACA_CREDS if unseeded.

meta.note: DR export of ACTIVE/published version ba2ecc0c — QTP Order Lifecycle Ingestor v1.0 (Conclave gap G22, created 2026-07-08). Polls Alpaca paper /v2/orders?status=all every 10 min (ET 09-16 weekday gate inside Code node) and idempotently inserts all order lifecycle states into quantum.order_events via NOT EXISTS. No literal secrets in workflow; Alpaca creds come from n8n instance vars or staticData (intentionally null here) — seed after import and re-attach Postgres credential.
